flags.name: runner.gemini-cli.enabled
flags.description: Enable Gemini CLI runner type for session creation

flags.name: ldap.autocomplete.enabled
flags.description: Enable LDAP user and group autocomplete for workspace sharing

flags.name: scheduled-session.reuse.enabled
flags.description: Enable reuse last session option for scheduled sessions

flags.name: jira-write
flags.description: Allow Jira MCP server to perform write operations in new sessions

flags.name: advanced-sdk-options
flags.description: Show Advanced SDK Options in session creation UI

flags.name: gerrit.enabled
flags.description: Enable Gerrit integration connector for code review workflows
